notes: Source, tests, Phase 8 docs, and N04 handoff/taxonomy artifacts are modified as part of the active development session.
Unrelated Obsidian workspace/diary files are also dirty and were not touched by this closeout.

iteration_results.summary: Baseline froze the N04 19-D blocker and confirmed topology-state reabsorption flags absent or false before source changes.
Added default-off topology-state reabsorption schema, policy flags, canonical digest, idempotency key, and fail-closed construction controls.
Committed LGRC-3 topology events can reabsorb active node and edge state through explicit lineage maps without producer mutation.
Packet ledger and active runtime state are rebased through the same topology event and lineage map; the original 6.0 vs 5.9 mismatch is resolved.
Coupling and feedback producers schedule post-topology work only from transported surface evidence plus a matching topology-state reabsorption record.
Snapshot, telemetry, artifact replay, negative controls, and compatibility checks validate the topology-state reabsorption chain.
Closeout artifacts produced and N04 return path recorded.

artifact_only_replay.scope_limitation: Producer records are validated by strict linkage under the current producer-record contract, not by canonical producer_record_digest.

verification.command: uv run ruff check src/pygrc/models/lgrc_9_v3_contract.py src/pygrc/models/lgrc_9_v3_runtime.py src/pygrc/models/lgrc_9_v3_runtime_state.py src/pygrc/models/__init__.py src/pygrc/telemetry/lgrc9v3_contract.py tests/models/test_lgrc_9_v3_runtime.py tests/telemetry/test_lgrc9v3_contract.py --extend-ignore F401,F403,F405

n04_return.next_question: Rerun strict topology-mutating movement with native topology-state reabsorption support enabled.

future_hardening: Add canonical producer_record_digest and validate producer records by digest as well as linkage.
Add an independent packet-ledger-by-digest artifact index for stronger artifact replay diagnostics.
Run the full repository test suite before committing the whole Phase 8 continuation checkpoint.
